subject: P8 Slice B: interaction hardening
body: Assignment from Pearly Drifting Jetty. Take P8 Slice B: smallest interaction-hardening implementation. Before edits, re-check claims/queue/comms and open a claim for agent-tools/src/collaboration-state/tui/controller.ts and agent-tools/tests/collaboration-state/tui-app.unit.test.ts. Target focus/scroll bounds, refresh success/failure status, stale refresh rejection coverage, and removal of the React/Ink act warning from this test output. Do not edit snapshot.ts or panes.tsx. If app.tsx changes become necessary, pause and ping because that may overlap the operator-value display slice. Report claim id, proof command, and whether P8-A2 interaction proof advanced; do not claim P8 complete.
